jobs.title: Junior Python Developer
jobs.description: We're looking for a junior developer comfortable with Python, Linux environments, and basic data pipelines. You'll build internal tooling, automate reporting, and maintain web scrapers. 0-2 years experience. Fully remote.

jobs.title: Senior Staff iOS Engineer
jobs.description: 8+ years of Swift and Objective-C required. Lead a team of 12 iOS engineers. Must relocate to the Bay Area. Deep expertise in Core Animation and Metal required.

jobs.title: Data Automation Specialist
jobs.description: Automate data collection and cleaning workflows using Python. Experience with web scraping (BeautifulSoup, Scrapy, or similar), cron scheduling, and Linux servers is a plus. Hybrid: 2 days/week in office.

jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
jobs.description: High-energy sales role. Cold call 100+ prospects daily. Uncapped commission, no base salary. No technical skills needed.
